text: 'g' toggles between graph and list view
description: keep aim selection. navigate to selected aim on switch (both directoin when grpah => list and when list => graph, use the focus aim camera movement function that should already be there in the reference implementation.

status.comment: Implemented 'g' key toggle between graph and list views. Ensured selection persistence and automatic camera focus (both ways) by adding 'immediate: true' to GraphView watcher and utilizing existing scroll-into-view logic in columns. Verified with build.
